title: UU Accurate Orbital Strike Cannon
body:
**Disclaimer**: If any issues or crashing happens or suggestions, please report on github issues page.

**Disclaimer**: The mod requires 0.19.2 fabric loader version, ill make it so you can use any version later on.

Update on 1.21.11, I added OSC crafting, stasis, Flame's wolves, and a nuke custom ring count 1-10. I am currently Working on updating everysingle version to the latest which is 1.0.1. Not out yet because I had to go out of town. I will update all versions by tomorrow.

I am also going to make the mod a plugin.

**1.21.x**: done

**1.20.x**: coming soon

**1.19.x**: coming soon

**Fabric**: done (1.0.0-1.0.2 stricty) (1.0.2 coming soon)

**NeoForge**: done (1.0.0-1.0.1 stricty)

**Forge**: coming soon

**Commands**:

/osc craftable [<true|false>] **Allows and disallows OSC crafting** (_crafting recipes are in gallery_)

/osc nuke: [<rings>]: **Nuke Shot**

/osc stab: **Stab Shot**

/osc stasis: [<x> <y> <z> <breakable|unbreakable] **Gives a stasis fishing rod to specific coords**

/osc wolves: Spawns 150 wolves
